title: dianthus pygmaeus
intro: Dianthus pygmaeus, also known as the dwarf pink, is a small perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Dianthus pygmaeus include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried and used in potpourri and perfumes.
